name: scribeflow
description: ScribeFlow monorepo: AI meeting-intelligence platform foundation.

scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run dev --workspace @scribeflow/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run dev --workspace @scribeflow/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/api && npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @scribeflow/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @scribeflow/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run lint --workspace @scribeflow/api && npm run lint --workspace @scribeflow/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:run: npm run build --workspace @scribeflow/shared && npm run test:run --workspaces --if-present
scripts.db:types: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public,storage > apps/api/src/types/database.types.ts
